title: Tenure / Employee experience — P0 remediation
summary: Applied all five P0 fixes to the Tenure employee-experience Figma artifact before Chairman review: deleted two build artifacts (4:585, 4:587), fixed AAA contrast on all ten per-stage cost values and the model-assumptions footnote, renamed 'GROSS MARGIN PER MARIA' to 'INFERENCE COST MARGIN' with a one-line disambiguation annotation (inference cost only; does not include Stratum SaaS margin, support, or infra — final figure 99.7% / 99.741% rounded), updated decisions-used text across all ten stages to the orchestration-event format ('1 orchestration decision (covers N sub-actions)') with footer lines on Stages 03 and 06, and confirmed P0-5 cost-panel background is already consistent at ink across all stages in the live file. Caveat: Kernel should confirm the orchestration-decision model in a follow-up; the N sub-action counts are derived from visible Console rows.
